Argentine Choripan

Glorious grilled sausage sandwich inside crusty French bread, overflowing with fresh chimichurri sauce.

⏱ 30m 🔥 Very Low

Ingredients

  • Pure pork sausages
  • French baguette bread
  • Fresh chimichurri
  • Criolla sauce (optional)

Preparation

  1. Grill sausages on BBQ.
  2. Butterfly cut them at the end.
  3. Toast the bread.
  4. Add plenty of chimichurri.
  5. Close and enjoy.
